summary: Observed same-window evidence ties /FireFlow/api/session most closely to the shared suite localhost bridge/polling path around getAFASessionInfo, FireFlowAffApi/NoAuth/CommandsDispatcher, and ws.php calls. Allowed-source evidence did not isolate a distinct BusinessFlow-cookie branch as the direct initiator before FireFlow serves the AFF session.
follow_up_recommendations: If higher-confidence attribution is needed, inspect FireFlow-side source or request-level headers for FireFlowAffApi/NoAuth/CommandsDispatcher outside this observe-only PHP/log slice.
Capture a targeted same-window trace around SuiteLoginSessionValidation.php and FireFlowAffApi requests to distinguish shared suite polling from explicit post-login redirect behavior.
Restore or locate the missing baseline run summary if operator context from the parent run is required.
